    • getValues

      public Function getValues()
      Placeholder for the sequence of values observed through the execution of an enhanced for loop. Follows David Cok's proposal to adapt JML to Java5.

    • isResponsible

      public boolean isResponsible(Operator op, JTerm[] subs, Services services, ExecutionContext ec)
      Description copied from class: LDT
      returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the logic subterms
      Specified by:
      isResponsible in class LDT
      Parameters:
      op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate
      subs - the logic subterms of the java operator
      services - the Services
      ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterms

    • isResponsible

      public boolean isResponsible(Operator op, JTerm left, JTerm right, Services services, ExecutionContext ec)
      Description copied from class: LDT
      returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given binary java operator and the logic subterms
      Specified by:
      isResponsible in class LDT
      Parameters:
      op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate
      left - the left subterm of the java operator
      right - the right subterm of the java operator
      services - the Services
      ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterms

    • isResponsible

      public boolean isResponsible(Operator op, JTerm sub, TermServices services, ExecutionContext ec)
      Description copied from class: LDT
      returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given unary java operator and the logic subterms
      Specified by:
      isResponsible in class LDT
      Parameters:
      op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate
      sub - the logic subterms of the java operator
      services - the Services
      ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterm

      translates a given literal to its logic counterpart

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the Term that represents the given literal in its logic form

    • getFunctionFor

      public Function getFunctionFor(Operator op, Services serv, ExecutionContext ec)
      Description copied from class: LDT
      returns the function symbol for the given Java operator.
      Specified by:
      getFunctionFor in class LDT
      Returns:
      the function symbol for the given operation, null if not supported in general or not supported for this particular operator.

    • getFunctionFor

      public @Nullable Function getFunctionFor(String operationName, Services services)
      Description copied from class: LDT
      get the function in this LDT for an operation identified by generic operationName. If the LDT does not support this named function, it should return null.

      This is used to resolve overloaded symbols.

      For example: "+" may map to "add" for integers, and to "addFloat" for floats.

      Overrides:
      getFunctionFor in class LDT
      Parameters:
      operationName - non-null operationName for a generic function
      services - services to use
      Returns:
      reference to the respective LDT-specific function for the operation, null if not available

    • hasLiteralFunction

      public boolean hasLiteralFunction(Function f)
      Specified by:
      hasLiteralFunction in class LDT

      public Expression translateTerm(JTerm t, ExtList children, Services services)
      Description copied from class: LDT
      Is called whenever hasLiteralFunction() returns true.

      translateTerm in class LDT
